text:
# [METRIC] profit

Definition:
Profit margin measures what percentage of revenue translates to profit

Formula:
profit / sales * 100%

Interpretation:

metadata.title: Profit margin is calculated as profit divided by sales times 100
metadata.definition: Profit margin measures what percentage of revenue translates to profit
